Completed Date DATE 8 Demographic information: date background information was completed. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
96 AC1A AC1A_LATE_NITE (AC1A) Stays Up Late at Night CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - stays up late at night. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
97 AC1B AC1B_NAPS (AC1B) Naps Regularly During Day CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - naps regularly during day 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
98 AC1C AC1C_OUT_1_WEEK
